text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hm? There's something awfully different about
you today. Did you become... more grown-up?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, you think so? I didn't notice it myself...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ah, I got it. It must be your birthday, right?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Um, yes! That's amazing. You could tell that
just by looking?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
A little. It also looks like you've got a huuuge
craving for some cake at the cafe near the
station!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Wow, you're right! Incredible, I only told that to
Bourbon—no one else!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Haha, just my intuition is all. Since we're both
out, shall we go together? It's your birthday, so
my treat.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Yay! Thanks so much! Hehe, this is great. I can
buy some for Bourbon too!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Good idea. But don't worry, that'll be on me too.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...To pay her back for the intel.
